suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam DevNet 0/1 launch decision following ePBS stability assessment
suggestions.rationale: Decision point was Monday April 14 (yesterday). Need to confirm whether ePBS was stable enough to proceed with Glamsterdam DevNet 0 or if bal-devnet-4 with dynamic EIP-8037 is needed instead.

suggestions.topic: Account Abstraction proposal alignment and path forward
suggestions.rationale: AA breakout was scheduled post-#234. Frame transactions are CFI'd as non-headliner, Wallet Title Deeds proposal was presented, and Scheme transactions (EIP-8XXX) were introduced. Need to clarify which AA proposals are actively being pursued for Hegotá and resolve mempool strategy concerns.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8037 state creation cost specification clarifications
suggestions.rationale: DevNet-3 testing revealed edge cases with spillover gas and state refunds. Dynamic cost spec is planned for bal-devnet-4. Need to confirm specification is stable enough for broader DevNet testing.

suggestions.topic: ePBS DevNet-1 blocker resolution and relaunch timeline
suggestions.rationale: DevNet-1 had multiple consensus bugs, peering issues, and client disconnections as of #234. Critical for Glamsterdam merge decision and overall fork progress.

suggestions.topic: History pruning minimum retention target consensus
suggestions.rationale: Discussion ongoing in History Expirator channel per #234 action item. Emerging consensus around 1 month minimum but needs formal decision. Relates to EIP-4444 and broader archive node strategy.

suggestions.topic: Gas repricing EIPs readiness for Glamsterdam DevNet-1
suggestions.rationale: 18 operations targeting 60 Mgas/s baseline were outlined in #233. If ePBS stable and DevNet-0 proceeds, need to confirm which repricing EIPs (7976, 7904, etc.) are ready for rapid DevNet-1 inclusion.

suggestions.topic: Engine API changes for ePBS: FCU shortcut removal and checkpoint sync zero hashes
suggestions.rationale: Two engine API changes were discussed in #234: allowing zero safe/finalized block hashes for checkpoint sync, and removing FCU shortcut to enable payload reorgs within 32 blocks. Need implementation status from client teams.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8070 Sparse Mempool client implementation feedback
suggestions.rationale: CFI'd in #233 with Geth prototype complete. Feedback was requested from other client teams but no updates provided in #234. May have been handled async, but worth confirming status.
